> # Protocol (async \342\200\224 sender doesn't wait for ACK before sending next):
> #   F:<offset>:<hex_chunk>:<crc32>\n  \342\200\224 data frame at byte offset
> #   NACK:<expected_offset>\n          \342\200\224 missing/bad chunk, resend from here
> # The receiver ignores frames with offset != expected_offset and NACKs.
> # The sender streams frames ahead and rewinds on NACK.
> # Disable echo on the serial console to avoid doubling traffic.
> # The sender's frames would otherwise be echoed back, wasting bandwidth.
>             # Wrong offset \342\200\224 NACK with what we need
